options.name: --api-key
options.description: A valid/unrevoked NuGet API key which has the appropriate privileges to run the command.

options.name: --package
options.description: The NuGet package idientifier.

options.name: --versions
options.description: A comma-separated list of versions.Example: 1.0.0-pre.1,2.0.0,3.0.0-alpha.

options.name: --confirm
options.description: Confirms all user interactions. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --api-key
options.description: A valid/unrevoked NuGet API key which has the appropriate privileges to run the command.

options.name: --package
options.description: The NuGet package idientifier.

options.name: --pre
options.description: Filter pre-release packages. If true, only pre-release packages are included. If false, only stable packages are included. If not specified, all (stable and pre-release) packages are included. [default: True]

options.name: --skip-latest-pre
options.description: Excludes the latest pre-release package.If true, the latest pre-release version is excluded. If false, the latest pre-release version is included. If not specified, the latest pre-release version is included. [default: False]

options.name: --skip-latest-stable
options.description: Excludes the latest stable package.If true, the latest stable version is excluded. If false, the latest stable version is included. If not specified, the latest stable version is included. [default: False]

options.name: --silent
options.description: Silences command output on standard out. [default: False]
